allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Google Trends side-panel viewer to Viral Engine

Adds a resizable, closable right-side sliding panel with a 3-step
workflow guide and a button that opens Google Trends in a new tab.
No iframe or proxy — compliant with X-Frame-Options policy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add server/routes.ts client/src/pages/ViralEngine.tsx && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Refactor Viral Engine: live-only trends and manual X search

- Remove AI fallback from trending topics route; RSS failure now
  returns source "no_data" with an empty array instead of generated data
- Add manual trend search bar \(input + "Search on X" button\) above the
  trends table; opens twitter.com/search?f=live in a new tab
- Clicking a trend row auto-fills the manual search input
- Update source badge: "Live" for Google Trends, "Unavailable" for no_data
- Show distinct "No live trends available" empty state on no_data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
